sql: SELECT id, name, status, department FROM users WHERE CASE WHEN #{filterType} = 'complex' THEN (status = #{status} AND department = #{dept} AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{namePattern}, '%')) WHEN #{filterType} = 'simple' THEN status = #{status} ELSE 1=1 END
templateSql:
SELECT id, name, status, department FROM users
<choose>
    <when test="filterType == 'complex'">
        <where>
            <if test="status != null">
                AND status = #{status}
            </if>
            <if test="dept != null">
                AND department = #{dept}
            </if>
            <if test="namePattern != null">
                AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{namePattern}, '%')
            </if>
            <choose>
                <when test="sortOrder == 'asc'">
                    ORDER BY name ASC
                </when>
                <when test="sortOrder == 'desc'">
                    ORDER BY name DESC
                </when>
                <otherwise>
                    ORDER BY id ASC
                </otherwise>
            </choose>
        </where>
    </when>
    <when test="filterType == 'simple'">
        <where>
            <if test="status != null">
                AND status = #{status}
            </if>
        </where>
    </when>
    <when test="filterType == 'none'">
        WHERE 1=1
    </when>
    <otherwise>
        <if test="defaultSort != null">
            ORDER BY ${defaultSort}
        </if>
    </otherwise>
</choose>
